projects.title: Channel AI
projects.subtitle: Multi-agent conversational analytics · 12 pilot deployments
projects.summary: Non-technical teams query their business data over WhatsApp in plain language. Cut reporting turnaround from ~2 days to under 30 minutes across 12 pilots.

projects.title: Sustify
projects.subtitle: AI-driven sustainability marketplace

projects.title: When Graph Structure Hurts
projects.subtitle: Lightweight path ranking for dense KG-RAG · ICMLC 2026
projects.summary: A simple MLP scorer hits 93.9% AUC on dense citation graphs, beating GCN and GAT with 13× fewer parameters.

projects.title: OneSKU
projects.subtitle: Hybrid BM25 + embedding retrieval
projects.summary: Hybrid retrieval with a custom harmonization pipeline for heterogeneous vendor catalogs. Sub-15s queries across multi-million SKU inventories.

projects.title: EST Certificate Management
